n: Book 1, Chapter 9: The Hall of the Swift River

steps.t: Tham Celechir is located on a hill to the north of Idhobel. Bregoleth wants to oppose the enemies that now hold Tham Celechir, the Hall of the Swift R…
Bregoleth is waiting at Idhobel for news of your successful endeavours at Tham Celechir, the Hall of the Swift River.
